name: Gypsy Schnitzel
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the veal scallops very thin. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Dip each veal piece into beaten egg, then coat in bread crumbs.
3. Heat oil and butter together in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Saute the veal until golden brown (about 15 minutes). Remove to a plate and keep warm.
5. Add chopped onions to the same skillet and saute until they become limp but not brown.
6. Add green and red peppers, water, beef bouillon cube, and mushrooms. Cook until just tender.
7. Combine whipping cream and flour in a bowl. Stir into the vegetable mixture.
8. Heat until the sauce thickens slightly.
9. Pour over the warm veal and serve hot.
